mapper.select: SELECT dsr.id, dsr.drug_id, d.drug_name, dsr.record_type, dsr.quantity, dsr.before_stock, dsr.after_stock, dsr.operator_id, e.realname AS operator_name, dsr.related_prescription_id, dsr.reason, dsr.create_time FROM drug_stock_record dsr LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON dsr.drug_id = d.id LEFT JOIN employee e ON dsr.operator_id = e.id WHERE 1=1 AND dsr.drug_id = #{drugId} AND dsr.record_type = #{recordType} ORDER BY dsr.create_time DESC, dsr.id DESC
